---
name: Pull Request
about: Submit code changes
title: "[PR] "
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## 📝 Description

Clear description of the changes:
- What was changed?
- Why was it changed?
- How does it work?

Closes: #[issue number if applicable]

## 🎯 Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Performance improvement

## 🧪 Testing Done

- [ ] I tested the changes locally
- [ ] I tested on mobile devices
- [ ] I tested in different browsers
- [ ] All pages load correctly
- [ ] No console errors or warnings
- [ ] Responsiveness is maintained

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style
- [ ] I've updated documentation if needed
- [ ] I've added/updated TypeScript types
- [ ] I've tested the changes thoroughly
- [ ] I've run `npm run lint` (no errors)
- [ ] I've run `npm run build` (builds successfully)
- [ ] I've self-reviewed my code
- [ ] I have no console errors
- [ ] I've squashed commits into logical units
- [ ] My PR title is clear and descriptive

## 📷 Screenshots

Add screenshots if this is a UI change:

**Before:**
[screenshot or N/A]

**After:**
[screenshot or N/A]

## 🔄 Review Notes

Any special instructions for reviewers?

## 🚀 Deployment Notes

Does this require any special deployment steps?
- Database migrations?
- Environment variables?
- Configuration changes?

## 💭 Additional Context

Any additional information reviewers should know?

---

**Thank you for your contribution!** 🎉
